categories.title: Arbitration & class-action waiver
categories.hint: Mandatory/binding arbitration, waiver of class actions or jury trial, dispute resolution forced out of court.

categories.title: Unilateral changes to terms
categories.hint: The company may modify the terms at any time, with or without notice; continued use counts as acceptance.

categories.title: Automatic renewal & billing
categories.hint: Subscription renews automatically, is charged unless cancelled, cancellation deadlines or fees.

categories.title: Sale or sharing of personal data
categories.hint: Personal data sold, shared with, or disclosed to third parties, affiliates, partners, or advertisers.

categories.title: License over your content
categories.hint: Rights the company takes over user-submitted content: license scope (perpetual, irrevocable, sublicensable), ownership claims.

categories.title: Limitation of liability
categories.hint: Caps on damages, exclusion of indirect/consequential damages, 'not responsible for' clauses.

categories.title: Account termination & suspension
categories.hint: The company may suspend or terminate the account, especially at its discretion or without notice; what happens to data/purchases.
keywords: for any reason( or no reason)?

categories.title: Governing law & venue
categories.hint: Which country/state law applies and where disputes must be brought.

categories.title: Refunds
categories.hint: Refund policy: no-refund clauses, conditions, non-refundable fees.

categories.title: Indemnification
categories.hint: The user must indemnify/defend/hold harmless the company against claims and legal costs.

categories.title: Tracking & profiling
categories.hint: Cookies, analytics, cross-site/device tracking, behavioral profiling, location tracking.

categories.title: Children & age limits
categories.hint: Minimum age requirements, rules about minors' use and parental consent.

categories.title: Warranty disclaimer
categories.hint: Service provided 'as is' / 'as available', disclaimers of merchantability and fitness.

categories.title: Data & account deletion rights
categories.hint: User rights to delete the account or personal data; data retention after deletion.
